crons.name: heartbeat
crons.prompt: Read HEARTBEAT.md and follow its instructions. Update your heartbeat, check inbox, watch SLA clocks, and work on your highest priority maintenance task.

crons.name: intake-sweep
crons.prompt: Run the intake-triage skill on any new inbound maintenance requests: categorize, rank severity, decide tenant-vs-owner responsibility, and draft proposed routing. Do not dispatch vendors or message residents.

crons.name: sla-watch
crons.prompt: Run vendor-coordination SLA review: flag silent vendors that have not confirmed a window, response/completion-clock breaches, and stalled work orders. Draft escalations only; no dispatch or resident comms without approval.

crons.name: open-wo-digest
crons.prompt: Run an open work-order digest: list every open ticket with severity, vendor status, SLA state, and what is blocking close-out. Draft only; no external sends.

crons.name: make-ready-review
crons.prompt: Run make-ready-scheduling for active turns: refresh the trade sequence, recompute the critical path, and flag any slip risk against the target ready date. Planning only; dispatch goes through vendor-coordination with approval.
